text:
- Update to 1.6.3
- Take maintainership

Makefile changed:
+MASTER_SITES=
+DISTFILES=
+DIST_SUBDIR=	${PORTNAME}
+EXTRACT_ONLY=
+PORTDOCS=	*
+.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
+post-install:

Changed and refined:
 do-install:
 pkg-plist

Generated and tested manually, tested with port test, sent with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99_6 (mode: update, diff: ports)

How-To-Repeat: 
portlint -A
looks fine.

port test: clean
